name: set_reference
description: Set a document as the reference (baseline) document for comparison within a project. All subsequent comparisons will use this document as the standard.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project

document_id.description: The document ID to set as the reference (baseline) document

name: compare
description: Compare a target document against the reference document and identify metadata mismatches. If a checklist is configured for the project, each checklist item is evaluated with pass/fail/warn status. Returns a detailed mismatch report with severity levels.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project

target_document_id.description: The document ID to compare against the reference

reference_document_id.description: Optional override for the reference document ID. If not provided, uses the project's designated reference document.

fields.description: Optional list of specific fields to compare. If not provided and a checklist exists, the checklist fields are used automatically.

name: set_checklist
description: Set the inspection checklist for a project. When a checklist is configured, the compare tool automatically evaluates each item with pass/fail/warn status.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project

description.description: Description of what to check for this field

severity.description: How critical this check is (default: medium)

items.description: List of checklist items to inspect during comparison

name: get_checklist
description: Get the current inspection checklist configured for a project.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project
